description: Overall its a really great platform to manage attendance, payroll and scheduling needs. Super easy to learn and execute
author: Vineet S.
pros: The interface with timecards and scheduling is really easy to learn and teach. We changed the software from Kronos and not much training was required to learn the new platform.
cons: Sometimes the employees complain about that they are not able to login. Also as a manager I struggle to login if outlook email is open

description: Overall, I’d say UKG Pro is a solid choice for any HR department looking to ease their workload. While no platform is perfect, my experience has been positive, and I appreciate how it helps us operate more efficiently. From payroll to time tracking, everything feels streamlined and easy to navigate. The interface is user-friendly, which is a huge plus—especially when you have team members who aren't as tech-savvy.
author: Haley R.
pros: One of the best things about it is how easy it is to access all my info in one place. The platform does a great job of centralizing HR data, so everything I need is just a few clicks away. The mobile app is fantastic! I can quickly check my timecards, view my pay stubs, and keep track of my PTO right from my phone. This not only saves time but also makes me feel more engaged with my work and aware of what's happening with my benefits.
cons: The mobile app tends to go down about once a month. It’s a bummer because when I rely on it for tasks and updates, suddenly losing access makes things a bit chaotic.

description: From an HR standpoint I really like it. From an employee standpoint they would probably say they dont like it
author: Lexi K.
pros: We used this for payroll, employee profiles, benefits, etc and its a pretty decent system. I quite like it.
cons: The mobile app was a bit hard to rule out to employees. Always getting locked out and they were in the office constantly to get their password reset.

description: Average. Integration with our ATS had issues often and, in turn, that caused a lot of issues and fristo
author: Abby G.
pros: The reporting features were good, ease of entry at onboarding, and onboarding process. Dashboard was easy to use.
cons: Customer service was not very responsive. Hard to get answers or direction on issues when you needed support quickly
author_profession: Director of Talent Acquisition and Org Dev

description: Overall this has been a great system to work on. The reporting is complex but once you get the hang of it, there are so many custom reports that you can create, there are many data points that you can extrapolate data from and gain valuable insights on your workforce.
author: Carlton C.
pros: Easily configurable to meet business needs. Mobile app is very user friendly and intuitive for our employees. For the money there is huge ROI, especially when compared to competitors, there is great value for the money.
cons: Would like to see a few more items from the desktop homepage be available on the mobile app. There are some documents that I would like more of our employees to have access to on their mobile device.

description: Loved using ultipro versus using workday now. Honestly wish the company would go back to using it... as well as using ukg workforce for clocking in & out.
author: Jenna B.
pros: Very easy to navigate between profiles, data entry for new hires as well as accessing compensation and tax information.
cons: accessing on computer was simpler and easy versus using the app at times, for some reason the server would crash or not retain login info.

description: Overall experience was positive as the system interacted well with 3rd party companies and was easy for our team members. The app does not have all the interactive features we would like.
author: Monica M.
pros: UKG Pro is easy to use for administrators and offers a versatile and reliable payroll system, supporting efficient day-to-day operations.
cons: As a large platform, communication with representatives was not always as agile as expected; however, the team was responsive in addressing our needs and worked with us to tailor the system to our company’s requirements.

description: Overall, this is helpful but can be improved. I just felt that more restrictions can be improved such as making updates on certain areas or can be customizable based on needs.
author: Ma. Cristina V.
pros: User friendly and navigation. The menus shows wide variety of options that you can choose from depending on your needs.
cons: When we need to make updates or changes, there are fields that are limited. It is better if more fields are customizable.

description: Overall, the app is easy to use and does what it needs to do without much confusion or bulk. It’s straightforward and an effective scheduling solution for an organization of any size.
author: Sergio P.
pros: UKG is easy to use, and the app integrates well with the desktop version. It is simple to use as an employee, and has powerful tools for management. It is an all in one solution for pay, time card, and scheduling.
cons: The breakdown of the hours on the time card can be confusing, but that is more a function of my organization’s convoluted differential rates.

review_title: A balanced View of UKG Pro
description: My overall experience with UKG Pro has been moderate. It helps organize tasks, and the self-service option for employees are useful. However, the system can feel complex and overwhelming at times. Overall, it gets the job done.
author: Vicente C.
pros: What I liked most about UKG Pro is that the system is user-friendly, with clear interface that makes navigating HR tasks simple.
cons: What I like least about UKG Pro is that some features feels buried deep in menus, making navigation a bit confusing at first.

review_title: An All-in-One Solution for Making HR a Strategic Partner
description: We’ve had a great experience with UKG overall. I appreciate that the system helps our department play a bigger role in shaping the organization, giving us the tools and insights to be a real strategic partner.
author: Jessica L.
pros: I really appreciate the reporting capabilities in this software. The ability to have all HR data centralized in one system makes managing information much more efficient and seamless.
cons: I appreciate the functionality of this software, but I wish the service and support were more responsive and effective at times. Additionally, having recruiting data seamlessly integrated with the document manager would greatly enhance efficiency and streamline processes.

description: The product is very frustrating and overly complicated. Little user adoption because of it. Their customer representatives aren’t even experts in the product.
author: Kevin F.
pros: There is very little I could comment on. Perhaps their org chart.
cons: Not intuitive at all for both administrators and users. Overly complicated. Lack of consistent experience across the system because of multiple acquisitions, horrible customer service and overpriced.

description: UKG Pro has a user-friendly interface that makes general implementation easy. It has helpful tools such as automatic time capture, online time tracking, reporting and analytics.
author: Francois C.
pros: The software enbles us to simplify our human resource management processes from employees scheduling, benefits administration to general compensation management. The software also allows real-time applicants tracking and all candidate management processes.
cons: Delayed alerts and notifications and poor customer support services are the major issues negatively affecting implementation of the software.

description: UKG Pro is a reliable HR platform. The interface is user-friendly, and it makes tracking employee information and payroll straightforward.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: What I like most is how it saves time by automating tasks like payroll and time tracking. Additionally, it is easy to use and makes managing HR tasks much simpler.
cons: Some menus and options are hard to find and could be more user-friendly. Overall it works well, but small improvements in speed and navigation would help.

review_title: UKG Pro: Clock in for review..
description: Overall it has helped both leaders and staff manage their time cards as well as time off efficiently
author: Louis C.
pros: The ease of being able to punch in and out from your cell phone. I also like the different features offered to help keep information secure
cons: Small screen can make correcting and editing time cards is difficult at times when utilizing the phone app.

description: My overall experience is satisfying, helpful and informal. I enjoy using UKG pro. Thank you for the good software we have
author: Zuleika C.
pros: I like how UKG Pro is very informal everything that needed is on the website such as pay stubs, W2s, bereavement forms, goals upload, volunteer pto , hand book, etc
cons: So far there’s nothing I have to say bad about it. I actually love it. Theres no bad reviews I have or anything negative to say about the software.

description: I downloaded the app without issue and needed no instructions because of how easy it is to navigate.
author: John W.
pros: Easy sign on. Very user friendly and all of the information I need regarding my pay and time off is right on the app.
cons: I honestly do not have any negative things to say about UKG Pro. It does all that I require for my timekeeping and pay and time offf.

description: Its excellent software with some of the most features I've ever used. My boss can approve my vacation requests remotely, and I can access all my important employee data.
author: Max K.
pros: What I like most about UKG Pro is the fact that it streamlines my schedule, timecard, and vacation time along with important employee details.
cons: I work in social services so my work environment can be semi volatile, causing me to be away from my desk frequently. The punch card is so accurate sometimes its hard to match up my punches.

description: Great, the software is for the most part very easy to use and helps employees to keep track of everything that is important such as pay, time clock and time sheets.
author: ZACHARIAH G.
pros: I really enjoy that all that all the main information needed is on the home page of the software making it very easy to access.
cons: I personally believe the time off section can be a little more in depth, it is not a bad setup but I think it should be more simplified.

description: Overall a good experience using the system. The system has a great user interface and has multiple components that can be configured to perform HR functions based on the business needs.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: UKG Pro is one of the best HCM tool on the market as it has all the components needed to run the HR functions. Its a full comprehensive tool.
cons: The only thing that need improvement is the online training components to further learn about the system.

author: Jasmine V.
pros: It is easy to clock in and clock out, the site is easy to understand and user friendly.
cons: Sometimes the website crashes and is unable to use. Also, the 15 min intervals are hard to read.

review_title: UKG is very convenient, and the app is great and easy to use!
description: I use this daily, for payroll, hours worked, time off requests, and tax forms
author: Nicholas B.
pros: The mobile app is very convenient, and the ease of use, is very nice!
cons: there have been reports from some of my reps, that the app crashes, they have to uninstall, then reinstall, and then it works fine.

author: Madison E.
pros: UKG is a great way to track your time card, submit time off requests, and see your allotted time sheets.
cons: I wish UKG Pro was a bit more user friendly and gave alerts when needing to approve your current pay period.UKG

review_title: Does what i need it to and more.
description: I have no complaints and i can find what i need. The only issue would be return time on tickets when i do have issues.
author: JD M.
pros: I find it easy to locate reports i need and processing is very straightforward.
cons: i do wish it was easier to have support return times on tickets.

author: Ellie S.
pros: I generally liked the self-service portal and the product design
cons: I found it complicated to search for certain information, like specific pay stubs
